title: croton hemiargyreus var. genuinus
intro: Croton hemiargyreus var. genuinus, also known as the Philippine Croton, is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family that is native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Croton hemiargyreus var. genuinus include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
